name: Diun
short_desc: Get notified when your Docker images have updates available.
author: CrazyMax
description: Diun (Docker Image Update Notifier) is a small command-line tool that periodically checks the registries behind your running containers and notifies you when a newer image is available. It runs headless — there is no web interface — and watches the local Docker daemon via its socket. By default it only tracks containers labelled diun.enable=true; flip "Watch all containers by default" on to track everything. Notification providers (Discord, Telegram, Gotify, email, webhooks, and many more) are configured with DIUN_NOTIF_* environment variables or a config file in the app data directory — see the Diun docs.

form_fields.label: Watch schedule (cron)
form_fields.hint: Cron expression for how often to check for image updates. Leave blank to check every 6 hours.

form_fields.label: Watch all containers by default
form_fields.hint: On: watch every running container. Off: only watch containers labelled diun.enable=true.
